title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
